description: Endlessly adaptable and ambitious, thriving in every climate and building empires within a single lifetime.
subraces: Imperial
City-bred subjects of sprawling empires, steeped in law, commerce, and courtly intrigue.
Nomadic
Wandering peoples following herds and trade routes, carrying their culture on their backs.
Tribal
Close-knit clans bound by blood oaths, ancestor worship, and sacred hunting grounds.
Nordic
Cold-hardened seafarers and raiders prizing honor, saga, and strength above all.
Mediterranean
Sun-soaked traders and philosophers building their wealth on olive groves and sea lanes.
Oriental
Heirs to ancient dynasties guided by strict codes of honor, calligraphy, and martial discipline.
Barbarian
Fierce warriors from untamed lands scorning civilization and fighting with primal fury.
Civilized
Urban dwellers shaped by written law, guild halls, and the comforts of settled life.
Primitive
Stone-age survivors hunting with flint and bone, reading the land like scripture.
Variant Human
Exceptionally talented individuals whose innate gifts set them apart from birth.
Mark of Finding Human
Dragonmarked hunters with a supernatural gift for tracking quarry across any terrain.
Mark of Handling Human
Dragonmarked beast-tamers forging unbreakable bonds with animals through magical intuition.
Mark of Making Human
Dragonmarked artisans whose touch can mend, shape, and enchant mundane materials.
Mark of Passage Human
Dragonmarked wayfinders gifted with supernatural speed and the magic of teleportation.
Mark of Sentinel Human
Dragonmarked protectors sensing danger before it strikes, shielding those in their care.
